title: Amtech K2001 10 Piece Stubby Combination Wrench Set
availability_text: Only 4 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DURABLE: This 10 piece stubby combination wrench set is made from drop forged, chrome vanadium steel with a polished, chrome plated finish
POPULAR SIZES: The set includes popular sizes between 10mm - 19mm and comes in a handy storage rack
RELIABLE PERFORMANCE: Designed for consistent results across repeated use
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 10pc Stubby Combination Wrench Set See more
